AUTHZ-DEEPLINK-001.evidence: blocks direct URL access to admin and master data pages for an unauthorized user

AUTHZ-ACTION-001.evidence: live permission, scope, membership, and restricted-project checks execute before protected service effects

AUTHZ-SERVICE-001.evidence: real PostgreSQL tenant and scope authorization adapters

AUTHZ-API-001.evidence: stable unauthenticated and permission-denied export responses

AUTHZ-ROUTE-MATRIX-001.evidence: every discovered protected GET route executes with a real authenticated session whose live permissions deny access and returns no export bytes

AUTHZ-SIGNOUT-ROUTE-001.evidence: the sign-out POST route rejects an untrusted mutation origin without revoking or mutating the authenticated session

AUTHZ-EVIDENCE-001.evidence: database-backed tenant, company, location, department, confidential-workforce, restricted-project, upload-content, required-evidence, legal-hold, exact private-byte, audit, no-mutation, and non-enumerating denials
